package rulecoverage

func NegativeInsecureRandomForSecurity() string {
    ruleID := "insecure_random_for_security"
    family := "security"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`math/rand` usage (any of `rand.Int`, `rand.Intn`, `rand.Read`, `rand.New`) in functions whose names suggest security use (token generation, key generation, password, nonce, salt, session)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
